subcodes.title: Words to some Indians, spoken on 1912-10-11
subcodes.first_line: Man must irrigate the Blessed Tree which has eternal fruits and is the cause of life for all on earth.
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان باید شجرهٴ مبارکه ئی را آبیاری نماید که اثمار باقیه دارد و سبب حیات من علی الارض است
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @symbolism, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East
